textByHashes.6ab6dc4a91a2db145eecf9cfc820aed6cc704a9d: Hey there. Looking to buy something?
textByHashes.fc8be289a58ff0032d3038aaa9ff06763dffc6ff: A selection of fun items for the best of adventurers! That said, be aware that I have little interest in the usual currencies...
textByHashes.902263b1b2b5ad84763296a62b6850c58f6477df: I'm afraid you don't have any trophies to claim.
textByHashes.fccf84ba1ffdad579bec8f358298469214358b53: Hey there! Sorry, I'd love to talk, but I'm very busy right now.
textByHashes.83c6fe7729929a14d9df8f0f0a918506ea5c129f: Hey there. I'm afraid I don't have anything for sale at the moment. Maybe another time?
textByHashes.26e69f11a4a5f966b03a172dc3150ecb2928cc2a: Sorry, I'm still getting things set up here. You'll have to come back later.
